prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical vintage cinematic celebrity poster styled like an aged “Golden Era Icon” archive file, featuring KYRIE CHEUNG as the dominant typography and a moody side-profile portrait on the right.

Canvas: Portrait poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, dark sepia and burnt-red palette, distressed paper texture, worn edges, scratches, dust, faded ink, subtle vignette, archival classified-document aesthetic.

Layout: Left third is typography-heavy; right two-thirds show a young East Asian man standing in profile facing left. Top left contains a boxed label reading “GOLDEN ERA ICON” with thin horizontal rules, two small stars, and a circular dragon emblem. Below it, place huge stacked condensed block letters: “KYRIE” on top and “CHEUNG” below, in tall vintage gold type. Under the name, add a thin divider with a small star, then the decade label “2020s”. Beneath that, add the quote “世人皆 Gay, 我独Straight” in gold, mixing Chinese characters with the English words Gay and Straight. Lower left includes a faded red circular stamp reading “ARCHIVE / CLASSIFIED / UNDERWORLD”. Bottom left reads FILE No.01 with thin decorative lines and small star/floral ornaments.

Subject details: The person is a slim young adult East Asian male with dark slightly messy medium-length hair, shown from head to thigh in right-side profile. His face is deliberately blurred/obscured by a rectangular soft blur block. He wears a loose off-white long-sleeve button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, tucked into dark high-waisted trousers with a black belt. One hand rests in his trouser pocket, and a wristwatch is visible. Pose is relaxed, elegant, and introspective.

Background: Dark old Chinese architectural setting with a deep red wall, shadowy roof eaves at the top, decorative circular roof ornaments and patterned trim. Lighting is low, dramatic, warm, and directional, casting soft shadows and emphasizing the vintage poster mood.

Visual style: 1930s–1970s Chinese noir poster meets modern editorial photography, grainy film texture, letterpress typography, aged gold ink, high contrast, cinematic shadows, historical archive design. Use exactly 1 portrait figure, 1 dragon emblem, 2 large name words, 1 decade label, 1 quote block, 1 circular classified stamp, and 1 file-number block. No extra logos or watermarks.
